use std::fs;

fn process_and_log(path: &str) -> Result<(), Error> {
    let content = fs::read_to_string(path)?;
    fs::write("/tmp/cache.txt", &content)?;
    log::info!("processed {}", path);
    Ok(())
}

fn cleanup(temp_dir: &str) {
    // Explicitly handle or log errors for cleanup
    if let Err(e) = fs::remove_dir_all(temp_dir) {
        log::warn!("failed to remove temp dir: {}", e);
    }
    if let Err(e) = fs::remove_file("/tmp/lock") {
        log::warn!("failed to remove lock file: {}", e);
    }
}
